context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the test-engine instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the task is to create or improve test coverage for a Rails engine.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **EVERY engine MUST have a dummy app for testing.**

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Add the smallest integration test that proves mounting and boot work. **Verify it passes before continuing** — if it fails, check `engine.rb` initializer order and mount configuration rather than adding more specs on top of a broken foundation.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Verify: dummy app exercises real host integration; routes tested through engine namespace; configurable seams covered with at least one non-default case; generators safe to run twice.
